cooked: Hey Tim, brand new to the forum but I’ve really enjoyed reading through this thread. I have one SP on hand, and another on the way, and would love to help out with this effort in any way that I can. I think a dedicated discord would be great, as well as a Github Org. Would be happy to set either/both of those up as well, if you’re interested!
